text: The version of you I know is a super girl. Cheer up, ushu papa. — B
You are stronger than this. Take a break, or come break my head if it makes you feel better. — B
You matter most to me. Please call me if you need me. — B
Turn your panic into panic for others, kiddo. — B
Tension lene ka nahi, dene ka. — B
Ushu papa, em kaaledu.. call chey naaku. — B
